query:
SELECT 'cases' as tbl, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status='published' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as published, SUM(CASE WHEN status='draft' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as draft FROM cases
UNION ALL
SELECT 'platforms', COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN status='published' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), SUM(CASE WHEN status='draft' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM platforms
UNION ALL
SELECT 'topics', COUNT(*), COUNT(*), 0 FROM topics
UNION ALL
SELECT 'jurisdictions', COUNT(*), COUNT(*), 0 FROM jurisdictions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'users', COUNT(*), COUNT(*), 0 FROM users;
